creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Frank, I am sorry if I haven't been helpful enough with my last comment. See, the problem is that without having synced email addresses between Bugzilla accounts and what is listed under port's MAINTAINER, it is difficult to automate maintainer requests and approvals, which creates an unnecessary burden to track such issues.

In this case, and the reason I requested you sync them up, there are three addresses involved, your old which you're changing (and the official recommendation is to send email address changes from your old address), your new in the patch and the third one for your BZ account.

So it would be best if you could sync your BZ and MAINTAINER addresses to be the same.

Kurt, if you think the above patch can be applied meanwhile, please do so, please don't allow my possibly too strict triage decision hold this back. :)
